general.name: Island Browser - Enroll Island Service
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>8E75061C-E59A-4A68-883E-AC5536CEE014</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>8E75061C-E59A-4A68-883E-AC5536CEE014</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Island Browser - Enroll Island Service</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string/><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Managed Login Items</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>7B952A5D-F4AC-4F5F-8D49-5A94A38EDC60B</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.servicemanagement</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>7B952A5D-F4AC-4F5F-8D49-5A94A38EDC60</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>Rules</key><array><dict><key>RuleType</key><string>Label</string><key>RuleValue</key><string>io.island.updater</string></dict><dict><key>RuleType</key><string>Label</string><key>RuleValue</key><string>io.island.service</string></dict></array></dict><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Custom Settings</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>3BCC6E17-14FB-48E4-A3CC-2E33120B129B</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ManagedClient.preferences</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>3BCC6E17-14FB-48E4-A3CC-2E33120B129B</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>io.island.service.token</key><dict><key>Forced</key><array><dict><key>mcx_preference_settings</key><dict><key>tokenKey</key><string>eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..l1WwIt0DT5G9MBwj5FizL8c5GYtLgd2Zeyw6noNhs6A</string></dict></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>
